com.hp.workpath.api.copier

Class CopyAttributesCaps

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributesCaps

  • public class CopyAttributesCaps
extends java.lang.Object
    Copy attributes capabilities provided from the printer.
    Since:
    API 3

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup> getBackgroundCleanupList()
      Retrieves the supported scan background cleanup options by the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.BookletBordersEachPage> getBookletBordersEachPageList()
      Retrieves Booklet Borders Each Page options supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves Booklet Finishing Option supported on the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.BookletFormat> getBookletFormatList()
      Retrieves Booklet Format options supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves the supported capture mode options by the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.CollateMode> getCollateModeList()
      Retrieves the collate options supported on the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ColorMode> getColorModeList()
      Indicates the groups of color sets which the scanned output will reside within.

      Retrieves the supported scan contrast adjustment options by the current printer.

      Retrieves the copies range supported by the current printer.

      Retrieves the supported copy preview options by the current printer.

      Retrieves the supported scan darkness adjustment options by the current printer.

      Retrieves the supported EraseMarginUnits by the device.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.FoldMode> getFoldModeList()
      Retrieves fold modes supported on the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ImageShiftReduceToFit> getImageShiftReduceToFitList()
      Retrieves ImageShift Reduce To Fit options supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves Image Shift Units supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves job assembly modes supported on the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode> getJobExecutionModeList()
      Retrieves job execution modes supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves number up directions supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves number up modes supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves the supported original orientation options by the current printer.

      Retrieves the paper sources supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves the paper types supported on the current device.

      Retrieves password types supported for protecting stored job on the current printer.

      A range for print size custom length.

      A range for print size custom width.

      A list of print sizes supported by the current printer.

      Retrieves progress dialog modes supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves punch modes supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves scale modes supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves the supported scan sharpness adjustment options by the current printer.

      Retrieves StampFormatFont supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves StampFormatStartingPage supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves StampFormatTextColor supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves stampPosition supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves StampType supported on the current printer.

      Retrieves staple modes supported on the current printer.

      Gets the supported text/photo optimization options by the device.

      Retrieve the supported watermark background color by the current printer.

      Retrieve the supported watermark background patterns by the current printer.
      Range getWatermarkDarknessRange()
      Retrieve the supported darkness range by the current printer.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getWatermarkFontList()
      Retrieve the supported watermark font options by the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType> getWatermarkMessageTypeList()
      Retrieve the supported watermark message type by the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkOnlyFirstPage> getWatermarkOnlyFirstPageList()
      Retrieve the supported watermark OnlyFirstPage options by the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkRotate45> getWatermarkRotate45List()
      Retrieve the supported watermark rotation options by the current printer.
      java.util.List<java.lang.String> getWatermarkTextColorList()
      Retrieve the supported watermark text color by the current printer.
      java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> getWatermarkTextSizeList()
      Retrieve the supported watermark text size options by the current printer.
      Range getWatermarkTransparencyRange()
      Retrieve the supported watermark transparency range by the current printer.
      java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkType> getWatermarkTypeList()
      Retrieve the supported watermark type options by the current printer.

    • Method Detail

      • getColorModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ColorMode> getColorModeList()
        Indicates the groups of color sets which the scanned output will reside within. For example, a monospace set indicates that the scanned output only includes black, white, and various shades of gray.
        Returns:

        the color modes supported CopyAttributes.ColorMode list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the color modes from CopyAttributes.ColorMode.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getOrientationList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.Orientation> getOrientationList()
        Retrieves the supported original orientation options by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported Orientation options CopyAttributes.Orientation list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from CopyAttributes.Orientation.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanDuplexList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.Duplex> getScanDuplexList()
        Retrieves scan duplex options supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported duplex options CopyAttributes.Duplex list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from CopyAttributes.Duplex.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanSizeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ScanSize> getScanSizeList()
        A list of scan sizes supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported scan sizes CopyAttributes.ScanSize list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the sizes from CopyAttributes.ScanSize.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanCustomLengthRange

        public FloatRange getScanCustomLengthRange()
        A range for scan size custom length.
        Returns:

        Retrieves the supported range for custom length by the device.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanCustomWidthRange

        public FloatRange getScanCustomWidthRange()
        A range for scan size custom width.
        Returns:

        Retrieves the supported range for custom width by the device.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getScanSourceList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ScanSource> getScanSourceList()
        A list of scan sources supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported scan sources CopyAttributes.ScanSource list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the source type from CopyAttributes.ScanSource.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getCopyPreviewList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.CopyPreview> getCopyPreviewList()
        Retrieves the supported copy preview options by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported copy preview options CopyAttributes.CopyPreview list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the copy preview options (true/false).

        Since:
        API 3

      • getBackgroundCleanupList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup> getBackgroundCleanupList()
        Retrieves the supported scan background cleanup options by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported levels of BackgroundCleanup settings CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the BackgroundCleanup levels CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getContrastAdjustmentList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment> getContrastAdjustmentList()
        Retrieves the supported scan contrast adjustment options by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported levels of ContrastAdjustment settings CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the ContrastAdjustment levels CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getDarknessAdjustmentList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment> getDarknessAdjustmentList()
        Retrieves the supported scan darkness adjustment options by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported levels of DarknessAdjustment settings CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the DarknessAdjustment levels CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getSharpnessAdjustmentList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment> getSharpnessAdjustmentList()
        Retrieves the supported scan sharpness adjustment options by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported levels of SharpnessAdjustment settings CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the SharpnessAdjustment levels CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintDuplexList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.Duplex> getPrintDuplexList()
        Retrieves the print duplex options supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported duplex options CopyAttributes.Duplex list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the Duplex options CopyAttributes.Duplex.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintSizeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.PaperSize> getPrintSizeList()
        A list of print sizes supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported PaperSize CopyAttributes.PaperSize list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the print sizes CopyAttributes.PaperSize.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintCustomLengthRange

        public FloatRange getPrintCustomLengthRange()
        A range for print size custom length.
        Returns:

        supported range for print custom length.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [5.5, 18.0].

        Since:
        API 3

      • getPrintCustomWidthRange

        public FloatRange getPrintCustomWidthRange()
        A range for print size custom width.
        Returns:

        supported range for custom width.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [3.86, 12.6].

        Since:
        API 3

      • getCopiesRange

        public Range getCopiesRange()
        Retrieves the copies range supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported range for copies.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the range [1, 9999].

        Since:
        API 3

      • getCollateModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.CollateMode> getCollateModeList()
        Retrieves the collate options supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported Collate options CopyAttributes.CollateMode list An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getPaperSourceList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.PaperSource> getPaperSourceList()
        Retrieves the paper sources supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported paper sources CopyAttributes.PaperSource list An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getPaperTypeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.PaperType> getPaperTypeList()
        Retrieves the paper types supported on the current device.
        Returns:
        supported paper types CopyAttributes.PaperType list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getScaleModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ScaleMode> getScaleModeList()
        Retrieves scale modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported scale modes CopyAttributes.ScaleMode list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getScalePercentRangeByScanSource

        public java.util.Map<CopyAttributes.ScanSource,Range> getScalePercentRangeByScanSource()
        Retrieves scale percent range supported by the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported scan sources with scale percent range as Map pair.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the ScanSource from CopyAttributes.ScanSource with the valid scale range.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getTextGraphicsOptimizationList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization> getTextGraphicsOptimizationList()
        Gets the supported text/photo optimization options by the device.
        Returns:

        supported text/graphics optimization options CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization.

        Since:
        API 3

      • getJobAssemblyModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.JobAssemblyMode> getJobAssemblyModeList()
        Retrieves job assembly modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported job assembly modes CopyAttributes.JobAssemblyMode list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getJobExecutionModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode> getJobExecutionModeList()
        Retrieves job execution modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported job execution modes CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getNumberUpModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode> getNumberUpModeList()
        Retrieves number up modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported number up modes CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getNumberUpDirectionByNumberUpCount

        public java.util.Map<CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode,java.util.List<CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection>> getNumberUpDirectionByNumberUpCount()
        Retrieves number up directions supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported of number up direction CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getPasswordTypeList

        public java.util.List<JobCredentialsAttributes.PasswordType> getPasswordTypeList()
        Retrieves password types supported for protecting stored job on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported password types JobCredentialsAttributes.PasswordType list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getOutputBinList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.OutputBin> getOutputBinList()
        Retrieves output bins supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported output bin types CopyAttributes.OutputBin list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 5

      • getProgressDialogModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ProgressDialogMode> getProgressDialogModeList()
        Retrieves progress dialog modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported progress dialog mode types CopyAttributes.ProgressDialogMode list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 5

      • getEraseMarginUnitList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.EraseMarginUnit> getEraseMarginUnitList()

        Retrieves the supported EraseMarginUnits by the device. Device support following erase margin units

        • INCHES
        • MILLIMETERS

        Returns:

        supported CopyAttributes.EraseMarginUnit list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the units from CopyAttributes.EraseMarginUnit.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackBottomRange

        public FloatRange getEraseBackBottomRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase BackBottom by the device.

        Returns:

        Supported range for EraseBackBottom.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackLeftRange

        public FloatRange getEraseBackLeftRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase BackLeft by the device.

        Returns:

        Supported range for EraseBackLeft.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackRightRange

        public FloatRange getEraseBackRightRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase BackRight by the device.

        Returns:

        Supported range for EraseBackRight.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getEraseBackTopRange

        public FloatRange getEraseBackTopRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase BackTop by the device.

        Returns:

        Supported range for EraseBackTop.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

        public FloatRange getEraseFrontBottomRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase FrontBottom by the device.

        Returns:

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

        public FloatRange getEraseFrontLeftRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase FrontLeft by the device.

        Returns:

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

        Since:
        API 6

        public FloatRange getEraseFrontRightRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase FrontRight by the device.

        Returns:

        Supported range for EraseFrontRight.

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 999] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

        public FloatRange getEraseFrontTopRange()

        Retrieves the supported range of Erase FrontTop by the device.

        Returns:

        • Return value ranges from [0 - 39] for Inches.

      • getImageShiftReduceToFitList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ImageShiftReduceToFit> getImageShiftReduceToFitList()
        Retrieves ImageShift Reduce To Fit options supported on the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported ImageShiftReduceToFit options CopyAttributes.ImageShiftReduceToFit list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from (true/false).

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftUnitsList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.ImageShiftUnits> getImageShiftUnitsList()
        Retrieves Image Shift Units supported on the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported Image Shift Units CopyAttributes.ImageShiftUnits list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from CopyAttributes.ImageShiftUnits.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftXFrontRange

        public FloatRange getImageShiftXFrontRange()
        Retrieves the range of ImageShiftXFrontRange.
        Returns:

        supported range for ImageShiftXFrontRange.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftYFrontRange

        public FloatRange getImageShiftYFrontRange()
        Retrieves the range of ImageShiftYFrontRange.
        Returns:

        supported range for ImageShiftYFrontRange.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftXBackRange

        public FloatRange getImageShiftXBackRange()
        Retrieves the range of ImageShiftXBackRange.
        Returns:

        supported range for ImageShiftXBackRange.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getImageShiftYBackRange

        public FloatRange getImageShiftYBackRange()
        Retrieves the range of ImageShiftYBackRange.
        Returns:

        supported range for ImageShiftYBackRange.

        • Return value ranges from [-26.0, 26.0] for Millimeters.
        • Return value ranges from [-1, 1] for Inches.
        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values with in the valid range.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getBookletBordersEachPageList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.BookletBordersEachPage> getBookletBordersEachPageList()
        Retrieves Booklet Borders Each Page options supported on the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported Booklet Borders Each Page options CopyAttributes.BookletBordersEachPage list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from (true/false).

        Since:
        API 6

      • getBookletFinishingOptionList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.BookletFinishingOption> getBookletFinishingOptionList()
        Retrieves Booklet Finishing Option supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported Booklet Finishing Option CopyAttributes.BookletFinishingOption list. An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.
        Since:
        API 6

      • getBookletFormatList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.BookletFormat> getBookletFormatList()
        Retrieves Booklet Format options supported on the current printer.
        Returns:

        supported Booklet Format options CopyAttributes.BookletFormat list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the options from CopyAttributes.BookletFormat.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getCaptureModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.CaptureMode> getCaptureModeList()

        Retrieves the supported capture mode options by the current printer.

        Returns:

        supported CopyAttributes.CaptureMode list.

        • Return can't be empty and should be either any of the values from CopyAttributes.CaptureMode list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStapleOptionList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.StapleOption> getStapleOptionList()
        Retrieves staple modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported staple mode options CopyAttributes.StapleOption list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getPunchModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.PunchMode> getPunchModeList()
        Retrieves punch modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported punch mode options CopyAttributes.PunchMode list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getFoldModeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.FoldMode> getFoldModeList()
        Retrieves fold modes supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported fold mode options CopyAttributes.FoldMode list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampPositionList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.StampPosition> getStampPositionList()
        Retrieves stampPosition supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported stampPosition options CopyAttributes.StampPosition list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampOption

        public com.hp.workpath.api.copier.StampOption getStampOption(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves stampOption supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported stampOption.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - when stampPosition is passed null.
        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampTypeList

        public java.util.List<com.hp.workpath.api.copier.StampType> getStampTypeList(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves StampType supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported StampType options StampType list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampPolicyTypeList

        public java.util.List<com.hp.workpath.api.copier.StampPolicyType> getStampPolicyTypeList(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves StampPolicyType supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported StampPolicyType options StampPolicyType list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampFormatFontList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getStampFormatFontList(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves StampFormatFont supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported StampFormatFont options list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampFormatTextSizeList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> getStampFormatTextSizeList(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves StampFormatTextSize supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported StampFormatTextSize options list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampFormatTextColorList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getStampFormatTextColorList(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves StampFormatTextColor supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported StampFormatTextColor options list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        public Range getStampFormatStartingPage(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves StampFormatStartingPage supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported StampFormatStartingPage options list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getStampFormatWhiteBackgroundList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Boolean> getStampFormatWhiteBackgroundList(CopyAttributes.StampPosition stampPosition)
        Retrieves StampFormatWhiteBackground supported on the current printer.
        Returns:
        supported StampFormatWhiteBackground options list.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkTransparencyRange

        public Range getWatermarkTransparencyRange()

        Retrieve the supported watermark transparency range by the current printer.

        Returns:

        List of supported ranges for watermark transparency.

        • Return value ranges from [-2 to 2]

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkOnlyFirstPageList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkOnlyFirstPage> getWatermarkOnlyFirstPageList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark OnlyFirstPage options by the current printer.

        Returns:

        CopyAttributes.WatermarkOnlyFirstPage list.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and should be either any of the boolean values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkOnlyFirstPage list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkDarknessRange

        public Range getWatermarkDarknessRange()

        Retrieve the supported darkness range by the current printer.

        Returns:

        List of supported ranges for watermark darkness.

        • Return value ranges from [1 to 5].

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkRotate45List

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkRotate45> getWatermarkRotate45List()

        Retrieve the supported watermark rotation options by the current printer.

        Returns:

        CopyAttributes.WatermarkRotate45 list.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and should be either any of the boolean values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkRotate45 list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkTypeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkType> getWatermarkTypeList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark type options by the current printer.

        Returns:

        CopyAttributes.WatermarkType list.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and should be either any of the values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkType list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkMessageTypeList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType> getWatermarkMessageTypeList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark message type by the current printer.

        Returns:

        CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType list.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and should be either any of the values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkBackgroundPatternList

        public java.util.List<CopyAttributes.WatermarkBackgroundPattern> getWatermarkBackgroundPatternList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark background patterns by the current printer.

        Returns:

        CopyAttributes.WatermarkBackgroundPattern list.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and should be either any of the values in CopyAttributes.WatermarkBackgroundPattern list.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkBackgroundColorList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getWatermarkBackgroundColorList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark background color by the current printer. Following colors are supported

        • Gray
        • Cyan
        • Magenta

        Returns:

        List of supported watermark background colors.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and it should be a list containing colors like gray, cyan and magenta.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkFontList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getWatermarkFontList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark font options by the current printer. Following fonts are supported

        • LetterGothic
        • AntiqueOlive
        • CenturySchoolbook
        • Garamond

        Returns:

        List of supported watermark fonts.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and it should be a list containing fonts like LetterGothic, AntiqueOlive, CenturySchoolbook and Garamond.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkTextColorList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getWatermarkTextColorList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark text color by the current printer. Following colors are supported

        • Black
        • Yellow
        • Green
        • Red
        • Blue
        • SkyBlue
        • Purple

        Returns:

        List of supported Watermark TextColors.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and it should be a list containing colors like Black, Yellow, Green, Red, Blue, SkyBlue and Purple.

        Since:
        API 6

      • getWatermarkTextSizeList

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Integer> getWatermarkTextSizeList()

        Retrieve the supported watermark text size options by the current printer. Following text size are supported

        • 30
        • 40
        • 60

        Returns:

        List of supported Watermark TextSize.

        • Return value shouldn't be empty list and it should be a list containing fonts size like 30 point, 40 point, and 60 point.

        Since:
        API 6
